author: y4rr
content: Observation: BN1d/2d/3d fixtures all have running_mean=zeros, running_var=ones (BN default). LazyBN fixtures have non-default values from training-mode forward pass. Decision: For BN1d/2d/3d, pre-perturb stats to known-non-default sentinels (e.g., 7.5/3.5), then call setter with fixture values, then round-trip getter assert with tight tolerance. This makes the round-trip non-tautological even when fixture==default. For LazyBN, materialize via num_features (per pre-flight elision), run training-mode forward, switch to eval, run eval-mode forward, assert eval output AND assert post-train running stats match fixture's running_mean/var (which are non-trivial).
